$comment: Knowledge Loop OODA transition matrix — canonical source of truth for ADR-000831 §7. The FE allowlist (loop-transitions.ts), BE classifier (classify_transition_event.go), and e2e tests all derive from this file via the conformance tests transition_policy_test.go (Go) and loop-transitions.policy.test.ts (TS). Edit this first; the conformance tests will drive any required implementation update.
